scripts.ready: pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.check: pnpm -F @archive-management/frontend-core check && pnpm -F @archive-management/web check && pnpm -F @archive-management/mobile check
scripts.check:fix: pnpm -F @archive-management/frontend-core check:fix && pnpm -F @archive-management/web check:fix && pnpm -F @archive-management/mobile check:fix
scripts.test: pnpm -F @archive-management/frontend-core test && pnpm -F @archive-management/web test && pnpm -F @archive-management/mobile test
scripts.build: pnpm -F @archive-management/frontend-core build && pnpm -F @archive-management/web build && pnpm -F @archive-management/mobile build
